ElementDescription: The NDAR Global Unique Identifier (GUID) for research subject
Subject ID how it's defined in lab/project
Date on which the interview/genetic test/sampling/imaging/biospecimen was completed. MM/DD/YYYY
Age in months at the time of the interview/test/sampling/imaging.
Notes: Age is rounded to chronological month. If the research participant is 15-days-old at time of interview, the appropriate value would be 0 months. If the participant is 16-days-old, the value would be 1 month.
M = Male; F = Female; O=Other; NR = Not reported

ElementDescription: Extensiveness rating of clinicians' efforts to teach or discuss rationale for using of Measurement-Based Care
Extensiveness rating of clinicians' efforts to use assessment data to discuss client current status
Extensiveness rating of clinicians' use of assessment data to discuss client's treatment trajectory
Extensiveness rating of clinicians' efforts to use assessment data to address alliance
Extensiveness rating of clinicians' efforts to discuss or employ a practice to address assessment data during a session
Extensiveness rating of clinicians' efforts to use assessment data to teach or discuss treatment planning
Extensiveness rating of clinicians' efforts to engage the client in shared decision-making
